Fix via structured JSON output (response_format=json_object) preferred over section-parsing. Non-negotiable invariant: missing declared key must raise, never silent drop (hard-rule #8). No new trust-boundary crossings.

BUG-018.proof: CONCERNS: feature legitimate, naive implementation opens prompt-injection superhighway via get_branch/describe_branch rendering + remix blast radius. Dev must satisfy 5 guardrails: allowlist-serialize (not denylist-strip), dedicated human-gated read verb, graph_compiler invariant field never enters state, per-node 4KB cap, grep-level pre-commit check.
